name: Liaoning Wellhope Agri-Tech Joint Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Liaoning Wellhope Agri-Tech Joint Stock Co., Ltd. produces and sells feed products for swine, poultry, ruminant animals, aquaculture, and fur-farmed animals in China. The company is also involved in trading of fish meal, meat and bone meal, soybean meal, cottonseed meal, rapeseed meal, and corn and its by-products, as well as feed additives, such as vitamins and enzymic preparations, amino acids, antioxidants, mould inhibitors, probiotics, mildew agents, acidifying agents, sweeteners, and disinfectants; and animal medicines, including antimicrobials, antiparasitic agents, antiviral drugs, and health care products. It also engages in the hatchery, broiler raising, slaughtering, and meat processing; manufacturing bio-tech, farm, and feed and livestock equipment; producing food products; and producing and selling and feeds and raw materials under the Wellhope brand name. In addition, the company provides medical and health care services for pet. The company exports its products to Spain, Norway, Nepal, Mongolia, Russia, Japan, Mexico, New Zealand, South Africa, Ethiopia, etc. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shenyang, China.
